pr.title: Medusa: Unstable S2 — DeltaNet Crawler, Legal (0.8822 BPB mean)

output.summary: DeltaNet crawler with Frugendorff loops uses loop-aware GPTQ int6 calibration within 600s by cutting training 30s short.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Not a val-only training regime; GPTQ calibration still uses training loop.
techniques: Frugendorff crawler stacking 4 flat + 1 crawler ×4 loops with DeltaNet heads
Loop-aware 2-phase GPTQ int6+zstd calibrated inside the 600s cap via GPTQ_RESERVE_MS=30000
